name: I'm at the corner of Main & Hickory
description: I'm at the corner of Main & Hickory
hints: Central intersection with exits in all four directions. The Yoyodyne building and Gas Station are here.
GO YOYODYNE to enter the office. GO GAS STATION to enter the gas station. All four compass directions lead to different areas.
NORTH goes to Main & Mountain View (room 4). SOUTH to highway ramp (room 5). EAST to Hickory Ave (room 6). WEST to Hickory Ave/shed area (room 7). The gas station has pumps and fuel.
notes: Central hub intersection. NORTH to Main & Mountain View (room 4, hardware store). SOUTH to highway ramp (room 5). EAST to Hickory Ave (room 6, toward cul-de-sac). WEST to Hickory Ave (room 7, shed with radio). Yoyodyne building entrance leads to office (room 1). Gas Station entrance leads to room 8.
